workflow.name: Manage LinkedIn outreach sequences with Linked API and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
Automate your LinkedIn outreach with this n8n workflow powered by [Linked API](https://linkedapi.io). Sends connection requests, monitors acceptance, delivers your pre-written messages, and follows up automatically – all tracked in Google Sheets.

 ## How it works

  1. **Connection phase** – Sends connection requests to leads with status `NEW`, respects daily limits
  2. **Monitoring** – Checks if connections were accepted, expired, or declined
  3. **Messaging** – Sends your pre-written messages (up to 3) after connection is accepted
  4. **Follow-up** – Automatically follows up if no reply, marks leads as `NO_RESPONSE` after timeout
  5. **Tracking** – All statuses and timestamps are saved to Google Sheets

  ## Setup steps

  1. **Copy the [Google Sheet template](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/141fJskisAQ7H8AxtojQ7LZrnd14EOyB26RdDq5aczEU/copy)**

  2. **Connect credentials:**
     - Google Sheets (OAuth2)
     - Linked API ([get key here](https://app.linkedapi.io/accounts))

  3. **Configure** `DOCUMENT_LINK` in the Config node (paste your spreadsheet URL)

  4. **Add leads** with `Status` = `NEW` and fill in `Message 1`, `Message 2`, `Message 3`

  5. **Activate** the workflow

## Configuration

| Setting | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| DOCUMENT_LINK | – | URL to your Google Sheet |
| SHEET_NAME | Leads | Name of the sheet with leads |
| DAILY_CONNECTION_LIMIT | 25 | Max connection requests per day |
| HOURS_TO_CHECK_IF_CONNECTION_ACCEPTED | 24 | Check frequency for connection acceptance |
| HOURS_TO_CHECK_IF_REPLIED | 4 | Check frequency for message replies |
| HOURS_DELAY_AFTER_CONNECTION_ACCEPTED | 24 | Delay before first message |
| DAYS_DELAY_BETWEEN_MESSAGES | 2 | Delay between follow-ups |
| DAYS_WAIT_FOR_CONNECTION_ACCEPTANCE | 10 | Timeout for connection requests |
| DAYS_WAIT_AFTER_LAST_MESSAGE | 4 | Days to wait after last message before marking as no response |

parameters.messageText: ={{ $('🔗 Merge Config').item.json.lead_status === 'AWAITING_REPLY_1' ? $('🔗 Merge Config').item.json.lead_message_2 : $('🔗 Merge Config').item.json.lead_message_3 }}

value.Next send date: ={{ $('🔗 Merge Config').item.json.lead_status === 'AWAITING_REPLY_1' ? $now.plus({ days: $('🔗 Merge Config').item.json.config_config_days_between_msgs }).toFormat('M/d/yyyy HH:mm') : $now.plus({ days: $('🔗 Merge Config').item.json.config_days_wait_last }).toFormat('M/d/yyyy HH:mm')

parameters.content:
## LinkedIn Outreach Automation
## How it works
1. **Trigger** runs every 2 hours, loads leads from Google Sheets
2. **Routes** each lead by status:
   - `NEW` → sends connection request
   - `PENDING` → checks if accepted/declined/expired
   - `CONNECTED` → sends first message
   - `AWAITING_REPLY` → checks for reply, sends follow-ups
3. **Updates** Google Sheet with new status and timestamps

## Setup steps
1. **Copy** [Google Sheet template](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/141fJskisAQ7H8AxtojQ7LZrnd14EOyB26RdDq5aczEU/copy)
2. **Connect credentials** in n8n:
   - Google Sheets (OAuth2)
   - Linked API ([get key](https://app.linkedapi.io))
3. **Paste** your Sheet URL into `DOCUMENT_LINK` in Config node
4. **Add leads** with Status = `NEW`, fill Message 1/2/3
5. **Activate** workflow (toggle top-right)

### NEW → Send Connection
Sends connection request, updates status to `PENDING`

### PENDING → Check Status
Checks if connection accepted, declined, or expired

### CONNECTED → Send Message
Sends first message after connection accepted

### AWAITING_REPLY → Follow-up
Checks for reply, sends follow-up messages (2 & 3)

### Trigger & Config
Runs every 2 hours. Edit `Config` node to change settings.

### Configuration

All settings in `Config` node:

- `DOCUMENT_LINK` – URL to your Google Sheet
- `SHEET_NAME` – Name of the sheet with leads (default: Leads)
- `DAILY_CONNECTION_LIMIT` – Max connection requests per day (default: 25)
- `HOURS_TO_CHECK_IF_CONNECTION_ACCEPTED` – Check frequency for connection acceptance (default: 24)
- `HOURS_TO_CHECK_IF_REPLIED` – Check frequency for message replies (default: 4)
- `HOURS_DELAY_AFTER_CONNECTION_ACCEPTED` – Delay before first message (default: 24)
- `DAYS_DELAY_BETWEEN_MESSAGES` – Delay between follow-ups (default: 2)
- `DAYS_WAIT_FOR_CONNECTION_ACCEPTANCE` – Timeout for connection requests (default: 10)
- `DAYS_WAIT_AFTER_LAST_MESSAGE` – Days to wait after last message before marking as no response (default: 4)

user.name: Linked API
user.bio: Control your LinkedIn accounts and retrieve real-time data, all through one API.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
